---
title: "Wine Quality Prediction Using Machine Learning Techniques"
author: "David Rodriguez"
date: "June 2026"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    keep_tex: false
    fig_width: 6
    fig_height: 4
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    fig_width: 6
    fig_height: 4
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ==================================================
# SETUP AND CONFIGURATION
# ==================================================

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = TRUE,
    warning = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    cache = TRUE,
    fig.align = "center",
    fig.show = "hold"
)

# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(corrplot)
library(rpart)
library(randomForest)
library(xgboost)
library(matrixStats)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(dslabs)

# Set options
options(digits = 4)
